name: showSessionSummary
description: Prepare the final learner-facing session summary slide only after reportLessonEvaluation has succeeded. Call once using only topics genuinely covered in the current call. The client holds this slide until the call has ended.

parameters.description: Short closing title, normally the lesson name or Session complete.
One to six concise topics genuinely covered during this call. Put each topic on a separate line. Do not include planned but uncovered topics.
Optional single most useful takeaway from the session in one short sentence.
A short natural thank-you or encouragement. Avoid generic motivational language.
